ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prisoners" (
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prisoner */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the prisoner */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the prisoner */,
  "intake_dt" TEXT /* Date the prisoner was admitted to the facility */,
  "exit_dt" TEXT /* Date the prisoner was released from the facility */,
  "release_reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release reason (foreign key) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the prisoner */,
  "crime_level" TEXT /* Level of crime committed by the prisoner (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the prisoner (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "cell_assignment" TEXT /* Cell assignment for the prisoner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prisoner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prisoners_release_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_reason_id") REFERENCES release_reasons ("release_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_reasons" (
  "release_reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release reason */,
  "release_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the prisoner's release (e.g., completed sentence, parole, transferred) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the release reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the rehabilitation program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility offering the program */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in weeks */,
  "program_outcomes" TEXT /* Expected outcomes of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prisoner_programs" (
  "prisoner_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prisoner-program combination */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rehabilitation program */,
  "enrollment_dt" TEXT /* Date the prisoner enrolled in the program */,
  "completion_dt" TEXT /* Date the prisoner completed the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the prisoner in the program (e.g., active, completed, dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prisoner_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prisoner_programs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES rehabilitation_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prisoner_programs_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_issues" (
  "behavioral_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavioral issue */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "issue_dt" TEXT /* Date the behavioral issue occurred */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the behavioral issue */,
  "issue_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the behavioral issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavioral_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_issues_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correctional_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correctional officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the correctional officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the correctional officer */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the officer works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer (e.g., administrator, counselor) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correctional_officers_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., correctional officer, counselor, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prisoner record */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "access_dt" TEXT /* Date when the prisoner record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "report_dt" TEXT /* Date the incident report was filed */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rehabilitation_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rehabilitation outcome */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rehabilitation program */,
  "outcome_dt" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehabilitation_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES rehabilitation_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rehabilitation_outcomes_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prisoner_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, JPG) */,
  "file_contents" TEXT /* Contents of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prisoner_files_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitor_logs" (
  "visitor_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor log */,
  "prisoner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prisoner */,
  "visitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the visitor */,
  "visit_dt" TEXT /* Date the visitor visited the prisoner */,
  "visit_description" TEXT /* Description of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitor_logs_prisoner_id FOREIGN KEY ("prisoner_id") REFERENCES prisoners ("prisoner_id")
)
